hooks.command: input=$(cat); msg=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.message // .prompt // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$msg" | grep -iqE '(explore|trace.*(module|feature)|understand.*(module|feature|how)|map.*(module|feature|arch)|how does .* work|relationship between|cross.?module|junction|unfamiliar|what touches|which files|cascades|dependencies between|before.*(start|implement|build))'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "UserPromptSubmit", "additionalContext": "GRAPHIFY REMINDER: This looks like a codebase exploration task. Run /graphify before reading individual files to build a visual knowledge graph. ERA Notes = design intent + hard rules; graphify = implementation reality + relationships."}}'; fi
